type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: An increase in fuel consumption due to the increase in mining activity associated with the transition from construction to operation occurred in 2015, yielding a change in annual emissions.  The calculation methodology remains similar to previous years , however,  the input data was refined (such as generator capacity and % loading) contributing to the fluctuation in emissions.
